style.artDirection: Minimal forged glyphs with a machined silhouette, a restrained fill accent, and no stock icon-pack dependency.

icons.label: Import image
icons.notes: Upward intake arrow landing into a weighted tray.

icons.label: Select subject
icons.notes: Broken lasso orbit around a compact focal seed.

icons.label: Background swap
icons.notes: Landscape tile with a corner-lift exchange move.

icons.label: Cleanup
icons.notes: Sweep arc and burnished spark to imply removal rather than destruction.

icons.label: Variations
icons.notes: Split prism with two resolved outputs on the lower edge.

icons.label: Create Tool
icons.notes: Centered core with three tabs and a small forge spark.

icons.label: Export PSD
icons.notes: Downstream release arrow framed by a lifted shoulder and base rule.
